description: Segment ownership moves where one certified route GPX already earns official credit that was previously assigned to a later route card.

promotions.reason: 15A-1's current GPX already covers Shingle Creek segment 1656 end-to-end in the required ascent direction. Claiming it on 15A-1 lets 16A-2 drop to the Sheep Camp-only route and saves 11.65 full-menu on-foot miles and 204 p75 minutes while preserving 251 official segments.
promotion_notes: This is segment ownership, not phone-progress credit. Official BTC progress still requires challenge-window activity validation.
The active packet must be regenerated from source and pass the field-packet certification chain after this promotion.

promotions.reason: FD14B's current GPX already covers Quick Draw segment 1610 end-to-end before FD14C appears on the calendar. Claiming it on FD14B lets FD14C be removed from the active route menu and saves 1.63 current-calendar on-foot miles and 68 p75 minutes while preserving official segment coverage.
promotion_notes: This is segment ownership, not phone-progress credit. Official BTC progress still requires challenge-window activity validation.
FD14C can only be removed after FD14B is regenerated as the credit-owning route card and the field packet passes recertification.

promotions.reason: Route 12's current GPX already covers Highlands segment 1576 end-to-end before FD22A appears on the calendar. Claiming it on route 12 contributes to removing FD22A and saves 2.76 current-calendar on-foot miles and 79 p75 minutes for the two Highlands segments while preserving official segment coverage.
promotion_notes: This is segment ownership, not phone-progress credit. Official BTC progress still requires challenge-window activity validation.
FD22A can only be removed after route 12 is regenerated as the credit-owning route card and the field packet passes recertification.

promotions.runner_facing_claim_text: Claim Shane's Trail 1 while following #26 Three Bears / #26A Shane's / #3 Watchman / #6 Femrite's Patrol Trail / Bucktail / Curlew Connection / Femrite's Patrol / Ridge Crest / Shane's / Three Bears / Two Point / Watchman; keep following the blue route line through the Shane's/Freestone connector chain.
promotions.reason: FD04A's current GPX already covers Shane's Trail segment 1649 end-to-end before FD19C after the calendar reorder. Claiming it on FD04A lets FD19C be removed while preserving 251/251 official coverage.
promotion_notes: This is segment ownership, not phone-progress credit.
FD19C removal is only valid after regenerated phone cues show the Shane's segments as FD04A credit.
